programme.title: Jab We Met
programme.desc: Shahid Kapoor, Kareena Kapoor, Tarun Arora, Dara Singh, Pavan Malhotra, Kiran Juneja, Saumya Tandon, Brijendra Kala, Asif Basra

programme.title: Jab We Met
programme.desc: Shahid Kapoor, Kareena Kapoor, Tarun Arora, Dara Singh, Pavan Malhotra, Kiran Juneja, Saumya Tandon, Brijendra Kala, Asif Basra

programme.title: Chalo Dilli
programme.desc: Mihika, an investment banker, misses her flight to Delhi and meets Manu Gupta, a talkative man. In order to reach Delhi on time, she must tag along with Manu and put up with his antics.

programme.title: Shagird
programme.desc: A rookie cop questions the tactics of his superior, and attempts to track the abductors of his girlfriend.
